_comment: 驱逐系第1条·人际版(排播表#1)。主题图/词图/动效逐集逐词定制，本集设计如下。

hook.vi: Những kiểu người này sẽ tránh xa bạn.
hook.pinyin: zhè lèi rén jiāng yuǎn lí nǐ
hook.themePrompt: an apocalyptic storm scene combining: a shattering red rose, a venomous green snake coiled around a cracked stone pillar, an ancient bridge snapping in half over an abyss, a white theater mask cracking apart, all lit by violent lightning under black storm clouds, rain streaks, epic movie-poster composition

words.imagePrompt: a single red rose shattering into glass shards in a violent night rainstorm, petals breaking apart mid-air, dramatic lightning backlight, dark blue and crimson palette
a venomous green snake coiled around a broken ancient stone pillar in deep shadows, sinister glowing yellow eyes, black creeping mist, sickly green rim light
an ancient stone bridge snapped in half over a dark bottomless abyss, the broken gap at center of composition, falling debris, storm sky with red lightning
a white theater mask cracking and peeling apart in floating fragments, hollow darkness behind the mask, eerie purple mist, cold moonlight

outro.vi: Gõ 'nhận' để họ tránh xa bạn. Ngày mai: những điều sẽ đến với bạn.
outro.preview: Ngày mai: những điều sẽ ĐẾN với bạn
outro.cta: Gõ 'nhận' để họ tránh xa bạn 👇
